what_they_sell: A comprehensive suite of payment processing and financial infrastructure APIs and tools that enable businesses to accept payments, manage billing, issue cards, and embed financial services.
primary_audience: Businesses of all sizes—from startups to large enterprises—including SaaS platforms, marketplaces, e-commerce companies, and developers building financial products.
key_value_props: Global payment acceptance across 135+ currencies and payment methods with 99.999% uptime
Flexible billing and revenue models including subscriptions, usage-based, and agentic commerce
Embeddable financial services including card issuing, money movement, and platform payments via Stripe Connect
company_interpretation: Stripe is a financial infrastructure platform serving businesses of all sizes—from startups to enterprises like Amazon and Google—by providing APIs and tools to accept payments, manage revenue, and embed financial services globally.
